data.name: WelcomePage_Slogan
data.value: CoffeePeek — Your guide to the world of coffee

data.name: WelcomePage_MainDescription
data.value: The ultimate companion for coffee enthusiasts. Discover the finest coffee shops, find your dream job in the coffee industry, explore brewing tools, and share your experiences with a like-minded community.

data.name: WelcomePage_Card1Description
data.value: Find the best coffee shops nearby with detailed info and reviews.

data.name: WelcomePage_Card2Description
data.value: Careers in the coffee industry for baristas, roasters, and other pros

data.name: WelcomePage_Card3Description
data.value: In-depth guides for all types of coffee brewing equipment.

data.name: WelcomePage_Card4Description
data.value: Rate coffee shops, leave feedback, and share your experiences.

data.name: WelcomePage_Card5Description
data.value: A recommendation system based on your personal preferences.

data.name: WelcomePage_Card6Description
data.value: Connect with fellow coffee lovers and share your expertise.

data.name: WelcomePage_Footer
data.value: Join our community of coffee enthusiasts! Share your expertise, discover new spots, and grow your career in the coffee industry with CoffeePeek.

data.name: Auth_FillAllFields
data.value: Please fill in all required fields.

data.name: Auth_LoginFailed
data.value: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.

data.name: Auth_EmailCheckFailed
data.value: Could not verify the email. Check your connection and try again.

data.name: Auth_RegisterFailed
data.value: Registration failed. The email or username may already be in use.

data.name: Auth_LoginAfterRegisterFailed
data.value: Account created, but automatic sign-in failed. Please sign in manually.

data.name: RegisterEmailPage_Description
data.value: Enter your email. We will check if you already have an account.

data.name: Home_Subtitle
data.value: You are signed in. Main content will appear here.
